candidate.objective: Proactive team leader with extensive experience supervising crews and operating heavy earthmoving machinery across civil construction, roading, and open-cut mining environments. Demonstrated ability to lead teams of up to 15 operators and truck drivers, manage multiple work fronts, and deliver projects safely and efficiently. Competent in a wide range of plant including bulk excavators (5t–30t diggers), dozers (D31, D51, D65, D8 Cat), graders (John Deere GP770, Komatsu), and articulated and rigid dump trucks. Experienced across Australia and New Zealand with major contractors and resource sector operations.

duties: Supervised and coordinated field crews to ensure compliance with company policies, safety procedures, and project standards.
Trained new employees on company procedures, work ethics, and equipment operation.
Operated 5t–30t excavators for bulk earthworks and final trim.
Operated Komatsu D31 and D65 dozers for bulk push and final trim.
Operated John Deere GP770 grader for final trim and pavement preparation.
Transported machinery and materials using truck and trailer combinations up to 14 tonnes.
Conducted toolbox meetings and shift handovers; enforced health and safety procedures.
Carried out construction and roading works across various civil projects.
Resolved conflicts between team members and reported findings on safety and environmental inspections.
Set performance goals and provided regular coaching and feedback to team members.
Operated excavators to construct retaining walls, clean and shape stormwater drains, and complete cut-and-fill works on house sites and driveways.
Trained new staff on machine operation, maintenance, and safety procedures.
Troubleshot mechanical problems quickly and accurately to minimise downtime.
Inspected sites to identify and remove obstacles and safety hazards.
Maintained accurate production records and ensured quality control across all tasks.
Transported machine materials to appropriate locations using motor vehicles.
Supervised civil construction crews on subdivision, drainage, and earthworks projects.
Operated 30-tonne excavator for bulk loading of dump trucks.
Constructed ponds and settlement control structures.
Executed cut-and-fill works for subdivision preparation.
Operated D51 dozer for shaping fill on house lots.
Installed drainage and underground services.
Operated Komatsu grader to shape road pavement.
Conducted daily tool meetings and enforced health and safety procedures.
Operated Cat 25-tonne excavator for rehabilitation and transfer operations.
Operated Cat D8 dozer for forming haul roads, maintaining dump sites, and shaping batters.
Operated Cat articulated trucks carting spoil and rock.
Operated Komatsu EX1200 for bulk excavation and overburden removal.
Operated Cat 777 rigid dump trucks carting overburden.
Maintained accurate records of machine operation, including output quantities and maintenance requirements.
Adhered to site safety standards and personal protective equipment requirements at all times.
Supervised a crew of 15 machine operators and truck drivers across open-cut mining operations.
Conducted toolbox meetings and shift handovers; managed planning and reporting with the Superintendent.
Enforced health, safety, and environmental procedures including environmental control, checks, and reporting.
Coordinated employee schedules and approved shift changes.
Provided technical support and coaching to team members to improve performance.
Conducted disciplinary action in accordance with company policy when required.
Organised weekly team meetings to discuss project progress, deadlines, and priorities.
Analysed survey and report data to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.

skills.detail: Experienced operating excavators (5t–30t and EX1200), dozers (D31, D51, D65 Komatsu; D8 Cat), graders (John Deere GP770, Komatsu), articulated and rigid dump trucks (Cat 777), and truck and trailer combinations up to 14t.
Proven track record supervising crews of up to 15 in mining and civil construction environments. Skilled in performance management, training, coaching, and multi-work-front coordination.
Experienced conducting toolbox meetings, shift handovers, safety inspections, and environmental monitoring and reporting. Committed to safe work practices and regulatory compliance.
Extensive experience in roading, bulk earthworks, subdivision preparation, cut-and-fill, retaining wall construction, drainage installation, and pavement shaping.
Open-cut mining experience including overburden removal, haul road construction and maintenance, bulk excavation, and rehabilitation at Stockton Mine (Westport) and Solid Energy operations.

certifications.details: Formal qualifications and tickets to be confirmed. ACM to advise.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
